device_name: Eko Foundation Analysis Software with Transformers (EFAST)
sensitivity: 83.4% (95% CI: 80.2 - 86.6%) for structural murmur; 94.7% (95% CI: 91.5 - 97.8%) for atrial fibrillation
specificity: 86.0% (95% CI: 82.2 - 89.8%) for structural murmur; 94.1% (95% CI: 92.1 - 96.1%) for atrial fibrillation
intended_use: The Eko Foundation Analysis Software with Transformers (EFAST) is intended to support healthcare professionals in the evaluation of patients' heart sounds and electrocardiograms (ECGs). The software c
intended_use_full: The Eko Foundation Analysis Software with Transformers (EFAST) is intended to support healthcare professionals in the evaluation of patients' heart sounds and electrocardiograms (ECGs). The software calculates heart rate, detects the presence of murmurs associated with Structural Heart Disease, and determines murmur timing, including the timing of S1, S2 heart sounds. When ECG is available, the software detects the presence of atrial fibrillation and normal sinus rhythm.
target_condition: Structural Heart Disease with murmurs; Atrial Fibrillation
ground_truth: For structural murmur: cardiologist annotations paired with gold standard echocardiogram; For ECG rhythm: expert annotations (electrophysiologists, certified cardiographic technicians)
other_metrics: S1 Detection: 98.58% sensitivity (95% CI: 97.21-99.38%), 93.27% PPV (95% CI: 90.94-95.15%); S2 Detection: 94.81% sensitivity (95% CI: 92.59-96.53%), 94.29% PPV (95% CI: 91.99-96.09%); Heart rate calculation mean absolute percentage error: <5%
